Alejandro — thanks again for the call earlier. Quick recap and proposed...
text:
From: Ben Carter <ben.carter@redwood.ai>
To: Alejandro Torres <alejandro@rapidstream.ai>
Cc: Priya Shah <pshah@rapidstream.ai>
Date: Sun, 09 May 2027 15:07:00 -0700
Subject: RapidStream discovery recap — latency & streaming targets + next steps

Alejandro — thanks again for the call earlier. Quick recap and proposed next steps so we have alignment before looping in SE/CS: 

Summary of what you asked for (please correct if I’m off):
- SLO targets: p95 inference latency <= 300 ms for typical prompt lengths (you mentioned 512–768 tokens in the longest flows). p50 target ideally < 120 ms.
- Streaming: UI requires partial-token streaming; first byte/time-to-first-token should be < 150 ms for most requests.
- Concurrency/throughput: steady concurrent requests ~150–200 RPS; peak bursts up to ~350 for ~1–3 minutes during rapid user surges.
- Retention & security: no persistent user PII storag...
